The Golden Gate Bridge Welcome Center is a perfect place to start your visit to The Presidio of San Francisco. You can easily reach here by taking the #28 bus which connects to many other bus lines. Great views of the famous bridge can be found here. It is also the beginning point of the hike along the California Coastal Trail which offers a couple more terrific viewpoints including the Golden Gate Overlook and the Pacific Overlook.

This is a must do in San Francisco- we walked across the Presidio and up the hill to the bridge - great photo opportunities all the way - weather was good and the fog kept away - do it - you can’t not 👍🏼
This is a good place to find information out about the area. It also has free toilets and a nice gift shop and of course, the views of the Bridge from outside.
